testcase.name: API connectivity pre-checks › backend health endpoint is reachable
API connectivity pre-checks › login endpoint returns 400 for empty body
testcase.failure:

testcase.name: API connectivity pre-checks › login endpoint returns 401 for wrong password
API connectivity pre-checks › login endpoint returns 401 for non-existent user
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › login.spec.ts:63:7 › API connectivity pre-checks › login endpoint returns 401 for non-existent user

testcase.name: API connectivity pre-checks › login endpoint accepts valid credentials and returns JWT
